name: Affordable Debt Consolidation & Debt Relief Houston

services: Debt Settlement/Debt Negotiation — negotiate with creditors to reduce total amounts owed
Credit Counseling — structure repayment plans to lower credit card interest rates
Debt Consolidation Loan referrals — compare lender offers for single consolidated payment
Bankruptcy consultation referrals — arrange free consultations with bankruptcy law firms
FDIC-insured account management — hold settlement funds for creditor payments
Free no-obligation consultation with Texas Debt Specialists
Performance-based fee structure — pay only when debts are successfully settled
